Short description:
Multi-factor quantitative research on the CSI 300 (沪深300) universe. Reproducible data pipeline, factor computation, IC analysis and quintile backtests with visuals and notebooks.

Suggested topics (GitHub repository topics):
quantitative-finance
factor-investing
backtesting
akshare

Suggested repository homepage blurb (one sentence):
Reproducible multi-factor research demonstrating data ingestion, factor construction, IC analysis and quintile backtests on the CSI 300 universe.
